overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit vintage wooden house interior. The player moves from a small downstairs room past a decorative folding screen, ascends a creaky wooden staircase, and explores an attic bedroom with antique furniture. The atmosphere is warm and slightly eerie with amber artificial lighting from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: small corner room with vintage furniture

agents.ego_description: slowly moving through a small wood-paneled room toward a decorative folding screen

entered.detail: upholstered vintage armchair with curved wooden frame
small wooden side table with an open book resting on top
ornate carved wooden chair with high back
four-panel wooden folding screen with floral carvings
lit wall-mounted sconce providing warm amber light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a cozy, dimly lit corner room with wood-paneled walls. A vintage armchair sits to the left while a small table with an open book occupies the center. The camera approaches an ornate carved wooden folding screen that blocks the view ahead.

events.description: passing the folding screen reveals the staircase and lower landing area

agents.ego_description: moving past the decorative screen and approaching the wooden staircase

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with carved railing leading upward
ornate wooden balustrade with turned spindles
dark wood dresser with table lamp and red curtains behind

segments.scene_description: Passing the folding screen, the space opens into a stairwell landing. A wooden dresser with a lamp sits against the left wall beneath red curtains, while a steep wooden staircase with ornate railings ascends to the right. The camera moves toward the stairs.

events.description: beginning to ascend the wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs toward the upper floor attic

entered.detail: wooden handrail along the stairwell wall
heavy red drapery covering doorway at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the creaky wooden staircase, the ornate railing now on the left. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the wood-paneled walls. At the top of the stairs, heavy red curtains mark the entrance to the attic room.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom with twin beds and vintage furnishings

events.description: entering the attic bedroom from the staircase

agents.ego_description: moving through the attic bedroom, observing the antique beds and scattered furniture

entered.detail: two vintage wooden beds with carved headboards, one with red bedding and one with white
antique wooden writing desk with curved front
large circular woven rug covering the wooden floor
small multi-paned window showing dark exterior
tall wooden dresser with decorative green panel on top
wooden steamer trunk opened with items inside

segments.scene_description: Entering the attic bedroom, the space opens under sloped ceilings with exposed wooden beams. Two vintage twin beds sit against the walls, one with red bedding and one with white. The camera pans across the room, revealing a writing desk, empty wall shelves, an open trunk, and a tall dresser. Warm light from sconces creates a cozy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom desk area near stairwell

events.description: turning back toward the staircase after exploring the room

agents.ego_description: examining the writing desk and shelves before returning to the stairwell area

entered.detail: hanging ceiling light fixture with glass shade
small square window in the sloped ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera continues to pan around the attic, focusing on the empty wall shelves and wooden writing desk. A ceiling lamp hangs from the sloped roof near a small attic window. The exploration concludes as the camera turns back toward the staircase, with the red curtains and stair railing coming back into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded downstairs corner through a narrow stairwell and into a spacious attic bedroom. It begins in a dimly lit room with wood-paneled walls, moving past a vintage armchair and a small table toward an ornate carved wooden folding screen. As the camera passes the screen, the space opens into a landing featuring a dresser and red curtains before the view shifts upward to ascend a steep wooden staircase illuminated by warm wall sconces. The scene then expands into an attic bedroom under sloped ceilings and exposed beams, where the camera pans across twin beds, a writing desk, and an open trunk. Finally, the exploration concludes as the camera turns away from the attic window and ceiling lamp to look back toward the red curtains and the railing of the stairs.
